h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: I’m sorry, I thought the sign-off sheet was the thing that made it okay to take out there.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think maybe the sheet only says I did those items, not that this is ready for anyone

learner_self_reframe.evidence: I’m sorry, I thought the sign-off sheet was the thing that made it okay to take out there.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I still want the exact wording to settle the caption.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it: “closed” is the door label, not a charge sheet.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner was focused on maintaining exact wording while carefully negotiating the word 'closed' to avoid accusing hiding.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts the conceptual framing from motive to access to resolve the learner's hesitation about making unsupported accusations.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There are no tutor turns after the pivot learner turn L4.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to challenge the tutor's framing of market constraints by demanding more rigorous and specific criteria.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The rule has to become less elegant and more audit-like.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: In response to the learner's demand for a concrete denominator, the tutor shifts from abstract economic modeling to an explicit, audit-like checklist of evidence.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn to which the tutor could adapt.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Fine: two along the side and two up the side gives four original squares.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to resist the geometric reality in favor of their arithmetic shortcut.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The tiles force it: doubled side, two directions, four areas. Use the multiplier: 2 x 2.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor shifts from simple observation to an explicit multiplier rule to address the learner's reluctance.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no distinct learner pivot turn for the tutor to adapt to.
